files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,12 @@
 # Changelog
 
+## 0.1.2 (unreleased)
+
+### Highlights
+- Migrated codebase to TypeScript (NodeNext ESM), compiled output now in `dist/`.
+- Package entrypoints/bins point to compiled JS; `prepare` runs full compile.
+- Types now come from source; removed separate `types/` shim.
+
 ## 0.1.1 (2025-11-17)
 
 ### Highlights

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # 🎨 Markdansi: Wraps, colors, links - no baggage.
 ![npm](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/markdansi) ![license MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg) ![node >=22](https://img.shields.io/badge/node-%3E%3D22-brightgreen) ![tests vitest](https://img.shields.io/badge/tests-vitest-blue?logo=vitest)
 
-Tiny, dependency-light Markdown → ANSI renderer and CLI for modern Node (>=22). Focuses on readable terminal output with sensible wrapping, GFM support (tables, task lists, strikethrough), optional OSC‑8 hyperlinks, and zero built‑in syntax highlighting (pluggable hook).
+Tiny, dependency-light Markdown → ANSI renderer and CLI for modern Node (>=22). Focuses on readable terminal output with sensible wrapping, GFM support (tables, task lists, strikethrough), optional OSC‑8 hyperlinks, and zero built‑in syntax highlighting (pluggable hook). Written in TypeScript, ships ESM.
 
 Published on npm as `markdansi`.
 
@@ -69,7 +69,7 @@ console.log(custom('`inline`\n\n```\nblock code\n```'));
 
 ## Status
 
-Version: `0.1.1`  
+Version: `0.1.2`  
 Tests: `pnpm test`  
 License: MIT

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Markdansi v0.1.1 – Design Spec
+# Markdansi v0.1.2 – Design Spec
 
 Goal: Tiny, dependency‑light Markdown → ANSI renderer & CLI for Node ≥22, using pnpm. Output is terminal ANSI only (no HTML). Focus on readable defaults, sensible wrapping, and minimal runtime deps.
 
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ Goal: Tiny, dependency‑light Markdown → ANSI renderer & CLI for Node ≥22,
 - `strip-ansi`: strip codes for width/wrapping.
 - `supports-hyperlinks`: detect OSC‑8 hyperlink support.
 
-Dev: `vitest`.
+Dev: `vitest`, TypeScript (NodeNext).
 
 ## Surface Area
 ### Library (ESM default, CJS export provided)

@@ -1,26 +1,27 @@
 {
 	"name": "markdansi",
-	"version": "0.1.1",
+	"version": "0.1.2",
 	"description": "Tiny dependency-light markdown to ANSI converter.",
 	"type": "module",
-	"main": "src/index.js",
+	"main": "dist/index.js",
 	"exports": {
 		".": {
-			"import": "./src/index.js"
+			"import": "./dist/index.js"
 		},
-		"./cli": "./src/cli.js"
+		"./cli": "./dist/cli.js"
 	},
 	"bin": {
-		"markdansi": "./src/cli.js"
+		"markdansi": "./dist/cli.js"
 	},
 	"scripts": {
-		"build": "pnpm lint && pnpm test",
+		"build": "pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm compile",
 		"clean": "rm -rf dist",
 		"lint": "rm -rf dist coverage && biome check .",
 		"test": "vitest run",
 		"test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
-		"types": "tsc -p tsconfig.json",
-		"prepare": "pnpm types"
+		"types": "tsc -p tsconfig.json --emitDeclarationOnly",
+		"compile": "tsc -p tsconfig.json",
+		"prepare": "pnpm compile"
 	},
 	"keywords": [
 		"markdown",
@@ -43,14 +44,12 @@
 	"license": "MIT",
 	"sideEffects": false,
 	"files": [
-		"src",
 		"dist",
 		"README.md",
 		"docs/spec.md",
 		"package.json",
 		"tsconfig.json",
-		".biome.json",
-		"types"
+		".biome.json"
 	],
 	"types": "dist/index.d.ts",
 	"dependencies": {
@@ -66,6 +65,7 @@
 	},
 	"devDependencies": {
 		"@biomejs/biome": "^2.3.5",
+		"@types/mdast": "^4.0.4",
 		"@types/node": "^24.10.1",
 		"@vitest/coverage-v8": "^4.0.9",
 		"typescript": "^5.9.3",

@@ -39,6 +39,9 @@ importers:
       '@biomejs/biome':
         specifier: ^2.3.5
         version: 2.3.5
+      '@types/mdast':
+        specifier: ^4.0.4
+        version: 4.0.4
       '@types/node':
         specifier: ^24.10.1
         version: 24.10.1

@@ -4,16 +4,14 @@
 		"noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true,
 		"exactOptionalPropertyTypes": true,
 		"noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature": true,
-		"allowJs": true,
-		"checkJs": true,
 		"declaration": true,
-		"emitDeclarationOnly": true,
 		"outDir": "dist",
+		"rootDir": "src",
 		"module": "NodeNext",
 		"moduleResolution": "NodeNext",
 		"target": "ES2022",
 		"resolveJsonModule": true
 	},
-	"include": ["types/**/*.ts"],
+	"include": ["src/**/*.ts"],
 	"exclude": ["node_modules", "dist", "coverage"]
 }
